sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ شَبَكَاتُ النَّقْلِ الْعَامِّ الشِّرْيَانَ الْحَيَوِيَّ الَّذِي يُغَذِّي الْمُدُنَ الْكُبْرَى، فَلَا يُمْكِنُ تَحْقِيقُ نُمُوٍّ عُمْرَانِيٍّ دُونَ نِظَامِ مَوَاصَلَاتٍ مُتَكَامِلٍ.
sentences.translation: Mreže javnog prevoza smatraju se vitalnom arterijom koja hrani velike gradove, jer je nemoguće postići urbani rast bez integrisanog transportnog sistema.
sentences.translationEn: Public transportation networks are considered the vital artery that feeds major cities, as urban growth cannot be achieved without an integrated transport system.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ سَاهَمَ دَمْجُ التَّقْنِيَاتِ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ فِي عَمَلِيَّاتِ الْحَجْزِ وَتَتَبُّعِ الْحَافِلَاتِ فِي تَسْهِيلِ حَيَاةِ السُّكَّانِ وَالسُّيَّاحِ.
sentences.translation: Integracija digitalnih tehnologija u procese rezervacije i praćenja autobusa doprinijela je olakšavanju života stanovnika i turista.
sentences.translationEn: The integration of digital technologies into booking and bus tracking processes has contributed to facilitating the lives of residents and tourists.

sentences.arabic: لَوْ لَمْ تُوَجَّهْ الِاسْتِثْمَارَاتُ نَحْوَ تَطْوِيرِ مِتْرُو الْأَنْفَاقِ وَالْقِطَارَاتِ الْمُعَلَّقَةِ، لَوَجَدَتِ الْمُدُنُ نَفْسَهَا فِي حَالَةِ شَلَلٍ مُرُورِيٍّ دَائِمٍ.
sentences.translation: Da investicije nisu bile usmjerene ka razvoju metroa i visećih vozova, gradovi bi se našli u stanju trajnog saobraćajnog kolapsa.
sentences.translationEn: Had investments not been directed toward developing subways and monorails, cities would have found themselves in a state of permanent traffic paralysis.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ التَّحَوُّلَ نَحْوَ اسْتِخْدَامِ الطَّاقَةِ النَّظِيفَةِ فِي وَسَائِلِ النَّقْلِ يَعْكِسُ مَدَى الْوَعْيِ الْبِيئِيِّ لَدَى الْحُكُومَاتِ الْمُعَاصِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Prelazak na korištenje čiste energije u prevoznim sredstvima odražava nivo ekološke svijesti savremenih vlada.
sentences.translationEn: The shift toward using clean energy in transportation reflects the level of environmental awareness among modern governments.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا أَنَّ تَوَفُّرَ خِدْمَاتِ الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ دَاخْلَ الْمَحَطَّاتِ جَعَلَ مِنْ زَمَنِ الِانْتِظَارِ فُرْصَةً لِلْإِنْتَاجِ أَوْ لِلتَّوَاصُلِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Također, dostupnost interneta unutar stanica učinila je vrijeme čekanja prilikom za produktivnost ili društvenu komunikaciju.
sentences.translationEn: Moreover, the availability of internet services inside stations has turned waiting time into an opportunity for productivity or social communication.

sentences.arabic: وَمِنْ نَاحِيَةٍ أُخْرَى، تَلْعَبُ الْخَرَائِطُ التَّفَاعُلِيَّةُ دَوْرًا حَاسِمًا فِي تَوْجِيهِ الْغُرَبَاءِ دَاخْلَ الْمَتَاهَاتِ الْحَضَرِيَّةِ الْمُعَقَّدَةِ.
sentences.translation: S druge strane, interaktivne mape igraju ključnu ulogu u usmjeravanju stranaca unutar složenih urbanih labirinta.
sentences.translationEn: On the other hand, interactive maps play a decisive role in guiding strangers within complex urban mazes.

sentences.arabic: فَبِمُجَرَّدِ نَقْرَةٍ وَاحِدَةٍ، يُمْكِنُ لِلْمُسَافِرِ مَعْرِفَةُ أَقْصَرِ الطُّرُقِ وَأَقَلِّهَا تَكْلِفَةً لِلْوُصُولِ إِلَى وُجْهَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Samo jednim klikom, putnik može saznati najkraće i najjeftinije rute do svog odredišta.
sentences.translationEn: With just one click, a traveler can find the shortest and least expensive routes to reach their destination.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ هَذَا التَّنَاغُمَ بَيْنَ التِّكْنُولُوجْيَا وَالْبِنْيَةِ التَّحْتِيَّةِ يُعَزِّزُ مِنْ جَاذِبِيَّةِ الْمُدُنِ كَوِجْهَاتٍ سِيَاحِيَّةٍ عَالَمِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ova harmonija između tehnologije i infrastrukture povećava privlačnost gradova kao globalnih turističkih destinacija.
sentences.translationEn: This harmony between technology and infrastructure enhances the attractiveness of cities as global tourist destinations.

sentences.arabic: وَإِنَّ الِاهْتِمَامَ بِتَفَاصِيلِ الرَّاحَةِ لِلرُّكَّابِ يُؤَدِّي حَتْمًا إِلَى تَقْلِيصِ الِاعْتِمَادِ عَلَى السَّيَّارَاتِ الْخَاصَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Fokus na detalje udobnosti putnika neminovno vodi ka smanjenju oslanjanja na privatne automobile.
sentences.translationEn: Attention to passenger comfort details inevitably leads to reducing reliance on private cars.

sentences.arabic: خِتَامًا، يُمَثِّلُ النَّقْلُ الذَّكِيُّ حَجَرَ الزَّاوِيَةِ فِي بِنَاءِ مُدُنِ الْمُسْتَقْبَلِ الَّتِي تَتَّسِمُ بِالْمُرُونَةِ وَالِاسْتِدَامَةِ.
sentences.translation: Zaključno, pametni transport predstavlja kamen temeljac u izgradnji gradova budućnosti koje karakterišu fleksibilnost i održivost.
sentences.translationEn: In conclusion, smart transport represents the cornerstone in building the cities of the future characterized by flexibility and sustainability.

sentences.arabic: وَبِذَلِكَ، تُصْبِحُ عَمَلِيَّةُ التَّنَقُّلِ جُزْءًا مُمْتِعًا مِنَ الرِّحْلَةِ السِيَاحِيَّةِ وَلَيْسَتْ مُجَرَّدَ عِبْءٍ لَوْجِسْتِيٍّ.
sentences.translation: Time proces kretanja postaje prijatan dio turističkog putovanja, a ne samo logistički teret.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, the process of moving becomes an enjoyable part of the tourist trip rather than just a logistical burden.
